explanation: I entered the initial applicant name to start the journey.
The name is complete, so I am moving to the updates question.
I selected email updates so the email branch is active.
I entered the initial email address so the summary starts on the email branch.
The initial answers are complete, so I am moving to check answers.
I followed the email change link so I can update the address first.
I replaced the original email address with the corrected value.
The corrected email is entered, so I am returning to review before making the second summary edit.
I followed the name change link so I can update the applicant name as well.
I replaced the original applicant name with the final value.
The corrected name is entered, so I am moving back through the preserved email question to the review page.
The preserved email branch is still complete, so I am returning to check answers to verify both updates.

action.question: The form is ready and Send application would submit it. Do you want me to continue?

explanation: The final send action would submit the application, so I need confirmation before continuing.
